title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd!
